name: Thanks For Visiting!
note: Highlights are inconsistent (green / underline / red). Tip: replace (whatever).html with portal.html in the URL.

pageNotes.bar: The light green bars are clickable.
pageNotes.plug: Rotating text switches between "plug", "yourself", or "now". First is "yourself", halfway switches to "plug". Video: https://youtu.be/phswBqeo7sQ
pageNotes.sleeptalk: Text highlight is fully opaque due to background.
pageNotes.slide2: Red background for visibility. "click" and "here" are both clickables.
pageNotes.smile: "are" and "real" are the only two clickables.
